description: L'entreprise OneTech est un groupe industriel de pointe qui fournit des solutions globales d'end-to-end dans plusieurs secteurs, notamment les circuits imprimés (PCBs), les services d'assemblage électronique (EMS), les systèmes de fil et de harnais, la fabrication de plastiques, la fabrication de câbles et les solutions ICT.

about.clean_text: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH About us Onetech Group / About Us / Our Story and Mission Empowering Innovation Through Industrial Excellence We are a leading industrial manufacturing group providing end-to-end solutions across multiple sectors, including printed circuit boards (PCBs), electronic manufacturing services (EMS), assembly, wire and harness systems, plastic injection & molding, cable manufacturing, and ICT solutions. Founded 47 years ago by a visionary and pioneering entrepreneur, Mr. Moncef Sellami , OneTech was built on a passion for engineering and a deep commitment to industrial innovation. Over the decades, we have evolved into a trusted partner for global clients seeking high-quality, cost-effective, and forward-thinking manufacturing capabilities. Our Partners Your Trusted Industrial Partner for Performance, Innovation, and Growth Our Vision To be a global benchmark in industrial manufacturing, recognized for excellence, sustainability, and customer-driven innovation. Our Mission To deliver advanced, integrated manufacturing solutions that exceed expectations, drive performance, and create long-term value for our clients and partners. Our Values We are driven by innovation, constantly improving our processes, technologies, and products. Our collective strength lies in teamwork and shared goals, allowing us to succeed together. We are committed to delivering excellence and reliability in everything we do. With agility, we adapt quickly to meet evolving market needs. Sustainability is at the heart of our approach, embedding environmental and social values into every aspect of our work. World Leading Companies Trust Our Expertise T r u s t e d G l o b a l l y T r u s t e d G l o b a l l y 0 + Countries served Globally 0 M EUR 2024 revenue 0 Team members Why work with us? At OneTech, we combine decades of experience with a forward-thinking mindset to deliver smart, scalable, and sustainable manufacturing solutions. Proven Expertise With 47 years of industrial know-how across PCBs, EMS, assembly, plastics, and more, we support complex projects with precision and efficiency. Strategic Location Our industrial base in Tunisia , combined with a strong presence in Morocco and France , places us at the heart of the Euro-Mediterranean region. This strategic positioning allows us to offer: Fast and flexible access to European markets Optimized supply chains and reduced lead times Cost-effective manufacturing close to Europe A reliable nearshoring solution for international partners By operating within a few days’ reach of major European hubs, we ensure agility, responsiveness, and lower operational costs for our clients. Engineering Excellence With a team of over 700 engineers, we bring deep technical expertise to every project. Our skilled engineers work closely with clients to co-develop innovative, high-performance products tailored to specific needs, ensuring precision, quality, and efficient solutions. Commitment to Quality We are ISO-certified and committed to the highest standards of quality, safety, and traceability across all production processes. Sustainability Focus We integrate ESG principles in everything we do—from reducing our carbon footprint to investing in clean energy and circular economy practices. Long-Term Partnerships We build lasting relationships based on trust, transparency, and a shared ambition for growth and innovation. Governance OneTech is governed by a management board , ensuring strong leadership, strategic decision-making, and clear accountability. Our governance structure is designed to support the group’s vision, promote sustainable growth, and ensure operational excellence across all business units. The management board works closely with all stakeholders, fostering transparency, efficiency, and a commitment to corporate responsibility in all areas of the business. With a focus on innovation, performance, and ethical standards, our leadership drives long-term value for both clients and investors. Executive Committee members CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER OneTech group Hedi SELLAMI CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER VICE PRESIDENT OneTech group Slim SELLAMI VICE PRESIDENT CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER TUNISIE CABLES Hichem FOURATI CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, Cables CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER TTE International Kais BELLIL CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, Wire & Harness CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER Eleonetech Khaled DAAMI CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, Electronic manufacturing services CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER Techniplast Hatem KAFFEL CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, Plastics CHIEF STRATEGY OFFICER OneTech group Lamia FOURATI CHIEF STRATEGY OFFICER, OneTech group CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER OneTech Business Solutions Khaled ABDELJAOUED CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, ICT Ethics & Integrity At OneTech, we are deeply committed to upholding the highest standards of ethics and integrity in all aspects of our business. Our dedicated Ethics and Integrity Policy guides our actions, ensuring that we operate with transparency, fairness, and respect for all stakeholders. We prioritize ethical decision-making and accountability, fostering a culture of trust both within our company and with our partners. In addition, we are proud to be ISO 27001 certified , demonstrating our commitment to information security and the protection of sensitive data. This certification ensures that we meet the highest global standards in safeguarding business information, reinforcing our reputation as a trusted and reliable partner. Our Locations TUNISIA 6 production sites MOROCCO 2 production sites FRANCE 1 engineering office Let's Shape the Future Together Connect with our Experts Contact us Get in Touch ##### Subscribe to our newsletter to stay in touch with the latest Email Send OneTech Group is committed to building a more responsible industry, combining technological innovation, sustainable performance, and respect for the environment. We believe in progress that serves both people and the planet ##
paragraphs: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH **About us** Onetech Group / About Us /

Our Story and Mission Empowering Innovation Through Industrial Excellence **We are a leading industrial manufacturing group providing end-to-end solutions across multiple sectors, including printed circuit boards (PCBs), electronic manufacturing services (EMS), assembly, wire and harness systems, plastic injection & molding, cable manufacturing, and ICT solutions.** Founded 47 years ago by a visionary and pioneering entrepreneur, **Mr. Moncef Sellami** , **OneTech** was built on a passion for engineering and a deep commitment to industrial innovation. Over the decades, we have evolved into a trusted partner for global clients seeking high-quality, cost-effective, and forward-thinking manufacturing capabilities.
Our Partners

Your Trusted Industrial Partner for Performance, Innovation, and Growth Our Vision To be a global benchmark in industrial manufacturing, recognized for excellence, sustainability, and customer-driven innovation. Our Mission To deliver advanced, integrated manufacturing solutions that exceed expectations, drive performance, and create long-term value for our clients and partners. Our Values We are driven by innovation, constantly improving our processes, technologies, and products. Our collective strength lies in teamwork and shared goals, allowing us to succeed together. We are committed to delivering excellence and reliability in everything we do. With agility, we adapt quickly to meet evolving market needs. Sustainability is at the heart of our approach, embedding environmental and social values into every aspect of our work.
World Leading Companies Trust Our Expertise
**_T_ _r_ _u_ _s_ _t_ _e_ _d_ _G_ _l_ _o_ _b_ _a_ _l_ _l_ _y_**** _T_ _r_ _u_ _s_ _t_ _e_ _d_ _G_ _l_ _o_ _b_ _a_ _l_ _l_ _y_** 0 + Countries served Globally 0 M EUR 2024 revenue 0 Team members

Why work with us? At OneTech, we combine decades of experience with a forward-thinking mindset to deliver smart, scalable, and sustainable manufacturing solutions. Proven Expertise With 47 years of industrial know-how across PCBs, EMS, assembly, plastics, and more, we support complex projects with precision and efficiency. Strategic Location * Our industrial base in **Tunisia** , combined with a strong presence in **Morocco** and **France** , places us at the heart of the Euro-Mediterranean region. This strategic positioning allows us to offer: * **Fast and flexible access** to European markets * **Optimized supply chains** and reduced lead times * **Cost-effective manufacturing** close to Europe * A reliable **nearshoring solution** for international partners By operating within a few days’ reach of major European hubs, we ensure agility, responsiveness, and lower operational costs for our clients.

Engineering Excellence With a team of over 700 engineers, we bring deep technical expertise to every project. Our skilled engineers work closely with clients to co-develop innovative, high-performance products tailored to specific needs, ensuring precision, quality, and efficient solutions. Commitment to Quality We are ISO-certified and committed to the highest standards of quality, safety, and traceability across all production processes. Sustainability Focus We integrate ESG principles in everything we do—from reducing our carbon footprint to investing in clean energy and circular economy practices. Long-Term Partnerships We build lasting relationships based on trust, transparency, and a shared ambition for growth and innovation. Governance

OneTech is governed by a **management board** , ensuring strong leadership, strategic decision-making, and clear accountability. Our governance structure is designed to support the group’s vision, promote sustainable growth, and ensure operational excellence across all business units. The management board works closely with all stakeholders, fostering transparency, efficiency, and a commitment to corporate responsibility in all areas of the business. With a focus on innovation, performance, and ethical standards, our leadership drives long-term value for both clients and investors. Khaled ABDELJAOUED CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, ICT Ethics & Integrity At OneTech, we are deeply committed to upholding the highest standards of **ethics and integrity** in all aspects of our business. Our dedicated **Ethics and Integrity Policy** guides our actions, ensuring that we operate with transparency, fairness, and respect for all stakeholders. We prioritize ethical decision-making and accountability, fostering a culture of trust both within our company and with our partners. In addition, we are proud to be **ISO 27001 certified** , demonstrating our commitment to information security and the protection of sensitive data. This certification ensures that we meet the highest global standards in safeguarding business information, reinforcing our reputation as a trusted and reliable partner. Our Locations

team.clean_text: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH Insights Onetech Group / Corporate / OneTech Group Joins Second Cohort of IESG Program by Tunis Stock Exchange and the International Finance Corporation / OneTech Group Joins Second Cohort of IESG Program by Tunis Stock Exchange and the International Finance Corporation Back to insights 01/16/2026 Corporate Written by otv2admin OneTech Group Joins Second Cohort of IESG Program by Tunis Stock Exchange and the International Finance Corporation We are pleased to announce that OneTech group is taking part in the second cohort of the IESG Program (Investment, Environment, Social, Governance) launched by Tunis Stock Exchange (BVMT), in partnership with the International Finance Corporation (IFC). Building on the encouraging outcomes of the first pilot cohort, this new phase, starting on January 15, 2026, marks an important step in strengthening ESG practices among listed companies. For us, this program is a concrete opportunity to further structure our Sustainability Strategy, reinforce transparency, and align our performance with international sustainability standards, in line with our long-term vision and responsibilities as an industrial group. We commend the Tunis Stock Exchange and IFC for this initiative, which contributes to advancing sustainable finance and responsible growth. paragraphs: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH **Insights** Onetech Group / Corporate / OneTech Group Joins Second Cohort of IESG Program by Tunis Stock Exchange and the International Finance Corporation / OneTech Group Joins Second Cohort of IESG Program by Tunis Stock Exchange and the International Finance Corporation Back to insights
* 01/16/2026 * Corporate
Written by

otv2admin OneTech Group Joins Second Cohort of IESG Program by Tunis Stock Exchange and the International Finance Corporation We are pleased to announce that OneTech group is taking part in the second cohort of the **IESG Program** (Investment, Environment, Social, Governance) launched by **Tunis Stock Exchange** (BVMT), in partnership with the **International Finance Corporation** (IFC). Building on the encouraging outcomes of the first pilot cohort, this new phase, starting on January 15, 2026, marks an important step in strengthening ESG practices among listed companies. For us, this program is a concrete opportunity to further structure our Sustainability Strategy, reinforce transparency, and align our performance with international sustainability standards, in line with our long-term vision and responsibilities as an industrial group. We commend the Tunis Stock Exchange and IFC for this initiative, which contributes to advancing sustainable finance and responsible growth.

services.clean_text: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH EMS Onetech Group / Electronics Manufacturing Services / Smart, Scalable & High-Quality Electronic Production In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries. Through our specialized subsidiary Eleonetech , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Integrated Module Manufacturing In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries. Through our specialized subsidiary Eleonetech , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Our Services Hardware & Software Design (HW & SW) Surface Mount Technology (SMT) Assembly Wave Soldering (Leaded and Lead-Free) under Nitrogen Manual Insertion and Assembly Potting and Selective Conformal Coating Laser Marking and Depaneling In-Circuit Testing (ICT) and Functional Testing (FCT) X-Ray Inspection Box Build and Final System Assembly Product Traceability & Factory-Wide Track and Trace System From Design to Mass Production At Eleonetech, we are involved at every stage Design & Development (CAD, prototyping, standards compliance) Industrialization & Manufacturing Optimization Testing Solutions Development (Flying Probe, ICT, FCT) Reverse Engineering and Obsolescence Management Supply Chain Optimization and Material Management Our engineers collaborate closely with clients’ R&D teams to ensure smooth transitions from product concept to industrial production. paragraphs: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH **EMS** Onetech Group / Electronics Manufacturing Services / Smart, Scalable & High-Quality Electronic Production

**In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries.** Through our specialized subsidiary **Eleonetech** , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in **automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy** to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Integrated Module Manufacturing **In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries.** Through our specialized subsidiary **Eleonetech** , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in **automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy** to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Our Services * Hardware & Software Design (HW & SW) * Surface Mount Technology (SMT) Assembly * Wave Soldering (Leaded and Lead-Free) under Nitrogen * Manual Insertion and Assembly * Potting and Selective Conformal Coating * Laser Marking and Depaneling * In-Circuit Testing (ICT) and Functional Testing (FCT) * X-Ray Inspection * Box Build and Final System Assembly * Product Traceability & Factory-Wide Track and Trace System

From Design to Mass Production **At Eleonetech, we are involved at every stage** * Design & Development (CAD, prototyping, standards compliance) * Industrialization & Manufacturing Optimization * Testing Solutions Development (Flying Probe, ICT, FCT) * Reverse Engineering and Obsolescence Management * Supply Chain Optimization and Material Management

Our engineers collaborate closely with clients’ R&D teams to ensure smooth transitions from product concept to industrial production. Advanced Capabilities * PCBAs on **FR4, IMS, and Flex PCBs** * Component placement accuracy: 30–50µm * Full traceability at each production step * In-line AOI (2D & 3D) and SPI inspection * SMT packages, exotic components, and LED binning management * FIFO buffer systems for oven output management * Specialized processes for BGA components and high-reliability applications

technology.clean_text: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH Design & Development Onetech Group / Design & Development / A cross-functional innovation hub At the core of our mechatronics cluster, the newly established Design & Product Development Division (R&D) reflects our Group’s commitment to delivering smart, integrated electronic solutions tailored to the evolving needs of high-tech industries. From technical feasibility studies to full industrialization , we support our clients throughout the entire product development cycle. While initially focused on the automotive industry , our division also addresses a wide range of high-potential markets with increasing demand for embedded electronics and intelligent systems. Our mission is to transform complex ideas into reliable, scalable products , combining innovation with industrial expertise. Partnering with : Multidisciplinary Expertise for Smart & Integrated Solutions Our team brings together core competencies in the following areas Electronic Design / PCB / PCBA End-to-end design, manufacturing, and integration of electronic boards engineered for harsh environments and demanding applications. Embedded Software Design Custom firmware and software development tailored to industry standards, with a strong emphasis on quality, validation, and performance. Mechanical Design Product/process integration and co-design from the earliest development stages, ensuring technical constraints are addressed seamlessly. Wiring & Cable Design Development of customized harnesses and cable assemblies optimized for each unique application A Group-Wide Innovation Enabler Our division is designed to work in close collaboration with other business units and subsidiaries across the Mechatronics Cluster. positioning itself as a cross-functional innovation hub. We deliver modular, intelligent products and subsystems that meet diverse technical needs while accelerating time-to-market. Whether you’re seeking to develop a new electronic product, integrate embedded systems, or co-design with manufacturing in mind, our Design & Product Development Division is your trusted partner for turnkey solutions. Companies and subsidiaries across the Mechatronics Cluster Let's Shape the Future Together Connect with our Design & Development Experts Contact us Get in Touch ##### Subscribe to our newsletter to stay in touch with the latest Email Send OneTech Group is committed to building a more responsible industry, combining technological innovation, sustainable performance, and respect for the environment. From **technical feasibility studies to full industrialization** , we support our clients throughout the entire product development cycle.
